rulings.Case Title: IN RE: 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2019 line 2. PETITIONER 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION Notice Of Hearing On Petition is continued to December 5, 2019 for parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings by November 15, 2019 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. rulings.Case Title: MARY RAGO VS. WOOD STREET PLAZA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Party Plaintiff Based On Assignment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2019 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT ROBERT RAGO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Party Plaintiff Based On Assignment is GRANTED. No opposition filed. rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ALEXANDER ET AL VS. GURU SHARANAM, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-572182 WITH CASE CGC-18-568522
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF ROBERT ALEXANDER, LASHIRAH BANKS, ANGELA BRONTLEY AMENDED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-572182 WITH CASE CGC-18-568522 is GRANTED. Actions are consolidated for all purposes CGC-18-568522 shall be the lead case. Trial date for the consolidated matters shall be June 1, 2020. All pre-trial deadlines shall be in accordance with June 1, 2020 trial date. =(501/CFH)
